leadText: The Droning Meadow (Japanese: 羽音の原 Droning Field) is an area located in the eastern region of the Crimson Mirelands of Hisui. It lies just to the south of Cottonsedge Prairie.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The topography of the Droning Meadow is uneven in its middle and upper portions. Plateaus, some nearly three times the height of the player , are densely spread across the landscape, creating a sort of maze-like feature. The foliage in this area is also fairly dense.
